Chunks.Content:
{
  "name": "@acme/web-dashboard",
  "version": "2.4.1",
  "description": "Web dashboard for the Acme platform",
  "private": true,
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc && vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest",
    "lint": "eslint src --ext .ts,.tsx",
    "format": "prettier --write src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "react": "^18.2.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "react-router-dom": "^6.20.0",
    "@tanstack/react-query": "^5.8.0",
    "zustand": "^4.4.0",
    "axios": "^1.6.0",
    "date-fns": "^2.30.0",
    "clsx": "^2.0.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/react": "^18.2.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.2.0",
    "typescript": "^5.3.0",
    "vite": "^5.0.0",
    "vitest": "^1.0.0",
    "eslint": "^8.55.0",
    "prettier": "^3.1.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^6.13.0"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=18.0.0",
    "npm": ">=9.0.0"
  },
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/acme/web-dashboard.git"
  },
  "license": "MIT"
}
